channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Bushmeat In Stew
item.description: Simple mod that allows you to put bushmeats in stews and soups

item.title: Warm Gambeson
item.description: Adds warmth to gambeson armor so you can wear it in winter and benefit from it

item.title: Bone Broth
item.description: Adds broths that can be added to soups for extra satiety

item.title: Ghaelen's Tweaks
item.description: My personal tweaks I like to play with.

item.title: Butchering Tables Consume Tool Durability
item.description: A Butchering patch where the table recipes only consume tool durability instead of the entire tool.

item.title: AUMT Server Tweaks
item.description: Various tweaks to mod for small AU server

item.title: Movable Rapid Water
item.description: Allows you to pick up rapid water source blocks with a bucket.

item.title: Alternative armor designs
item.description: With this mod, you can make use of all game armor designs for each equivalent armor type.

item.title: Temporal Convergence
item.description: Expands the creatures emerging from temporal rifts with new eldritch entities, afflicted automatons,

item.title: Ozzie's Clothing
item.description: A simple clothing mod, this is my first attempt at modding so don't expect it to be that good.

item.title: Traveling Bells
item.description: Teleport Between Linked Bells. Strike With Mallet To Set Arrival Point and Teleport. (Comes at Cost)

item.title: CompostTweak
item.description: Makes composting alot more interactive and adds more things to compost.

item.title: Frontier Trapper
item.description: Custom adli's class draft

item.title: Runic Armory
item.description: Adds runic textures to combat overhauls Armory mod!

item.title: Stratum - High-performance server software.
item.description: Focused on smoother multiplayer servers, better performance under load and, practical tools.

item.title: Hook Molds
item.description: This mod adds two molds for hooks for the Butchering Mod

item.title: Eternal Seraph: Chests
item.description: These chests were created for the [UA] Eternal Seraph server

item.title: topgsmod
item.description: TopGs Community Mod

item.title: In Dappled Groves Firewood Buff Continued
item.description: Adjusts some of In Dappled Groves' recipes

item.title: Atlas
item.description: Integration testing for mods: xUnit scenarios against a real headless server, in your IDE and CI

item.title: Craft-a-Bell
item.description: Craftable Fren that can alert you to nearby enemies, times of day, and hold messages.

item.title: Age of Seraphs Tweaks
item.description: Tweaks for the Age of Seraphs server that were too small to make into their own mods

item.title: Rabbit Taming
item.description: Have your fluffy friends as pets. Hares are now tamable and become Bunnies. Requires Pet Ai.

item.title: SheyderMod
item.description: A simple SheyderMod that supports the original artstyle of the game.

item.title: BotaniaStory
item.description: BotaniaStory - nature magic, mana, and automation in Vintage Story!

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Colored Lava
item.description: Adds configurable dark blue, black, white, red, and dark green lava with weighted collision outputs

item.title: Laboro's Multi-Tools
item.description: 2 Multitools and 2 craft tools for all your desires

item.title: Window Storage Lib
item.description: Library used for my Window Storage and Vanilla Pane Storage mods aswell as modders

item.title: Hotbar Restrictor
item.description: Restricts inventory to 4 hotbar and 2 backpack slots.
